title: Procedure: Running samples in the rheometer
author: Lalo, Avar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Laboratory procedure used in this thesis to obtain flow curves of xanthan- and carbopol-based model fluids with the rheometer. The document describes instrument start-up, geometry installation, measurement of xanthan and carbopol samples, data export, and shutdown and cleaning. For carbopol samples, the procedure also includes a preshear step before the flow-curve measurement. This procedure is part of the thesis  Experimental Investigation of Displacement Flow in Irregular Annuli . The work was carried out at the University of Stavanger (UiS).
